run_config.strategy:
(then
  (repeat
    (then simplify propagate-values
          (using-params macro-finder :elim_and false) simplify
          snf simplify elim-and solve-eqs
          (repeat (then der simplify) 5)
          distribute-forall simplify
          reduce-args simplify
          macro-finder simplify
          ufbv-rewriter simplify
          quasi-macros simplify
          (repeat (then der simplify) 5) simplify)
    3)
  smt)
